positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    japanese_company(sK1(X0)) | ~top10(X0)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    legend_of_zelda != fifa22).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    top10(legend_of_zelda)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    sells_more_than_million(legend_of_zelda)).

cnf(u24,negated_conjecture,
    ~created(X0,fifa22) | ~japanese_company(X0)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    created(sK0,legend_of_zelda)).

cnf(u27,negated_conjecture,
    ~top10(fifa22)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    created(sK1(X0),X0) | ~top10(X0)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    japanese_company(sK0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    ~sells_more_than_million(X0) | top10(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define game(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
